title: Elio's Gigantic Mix-Up
synopsis: When Elio accidentally uses his mom's grow-big potion instead of orange juice, he becomes enormous! With help from his diverse group of friends, he learns that sometimes the biggest problems need the smallest solutions.

pages.text: Elio loved mornings. He loved pancakes. He loved orange juice. But most of all, he loved his mom's science lab in the basement. Mom was a scientist who made amazing potions and fizzy experiments. Today, Elio woke up extra hungry. His tummy rumbled like a monster truck. "I need breakfast NOW!" he said, jumping out of bed. He ran to the kitchen in his dinosaur pajamas.

illustration.description: A young Latino boy with messy dark hair and big brown eyes jumping out of bed excitedly. He's wearing green dinosaur pajamas and has a huge smile. His bedroom has colorful toys scattered around and bright morning sunlight streaming through the window.
illustration.alt: Elio jumping out of bed in dinosaur pajamas

pages.text: Mom was already at work in her lab. Dad was walking their dog, Biscuit. Elio's stomach growled again. "Pancakes can wait," he said. "I need juice first!" He opened the fridge and grabbed what looked like orange juice. The bottle was orange and bubbly. "Perfect!" Elio said. He poured a big glass and drank it all in one gulp. "Mmm, tastes funny," he said. "But good funny!"

illustration.description: Elio standing in a bright kitchen, holding an empty glass with orange liquid residue. The fridge is open behind him showing various bottles. He has a puzzled but happy expression, with orange drops on his chin. The kitchen has warm yellow walls and colorful magnets on the fridge.
illustration.alt: Elio drinking from a glass in the kitchen

pages.text: Suddenly, Elio felt tingly all over. His pajamas felt tight. His head bumped the ceiling light. "Uh oh," Elio said in a much deeper voice. He looked down. Way, way down. His feet looked tiny and far away. "I'M GIANT!" he boomed. The house shook when he spoke. Pictures fell off the walls. Biscuit started barking from outside. Elio had drunk Mom's Super-Size Growing Potion by mistake!

illustration.description: A giant Elio crouched in the kitchen, his head touching the ceiling. His dinosaur pajamas are stretched tight and torn at the seams. His eyes are wide with shock and his mouth is open in surprise. The kitchen looks tiny around him with fallen picture frames and a shaking chandelier.
illustration.alt: Giant Elio squeezed into the small kitchen

pages.text: Elio tried to walk but his giant feet crashed through the floor. BOOM! CRASH! "Sorry, house!" he said. His voice was so loud that car alarms went off outside. Mrs. Chen next door peeked out her window and gasped. "Elio?" she called. "Yes, Mrs. Chen! I'm having a big day!" Elio waved. His giant hand accidentally knocked leaves off her apple tree. "Very big day indeed!" Mrs. Chen laughed.

illustration.description: Giant Elio standing outside, towering over suburban houses. He's waving sheepishly at Mrs. Chen, an elderly Asian woman in her garden who is laughing and pointing up at him. Apple tree leaves are floating in the air. The scene is bright and sunny with colorful flower gardens and white picket fences.
illustration.alt: Giant Elio waving at his neighbor Mrs. Chen

pages.text: Soon, Elio's friends came running. There was Maya with her bright red curls bouncing. Jamal rode up on his blue bicycle. Zara came with her little sister Amara. "ELIO!" Maya shouted. "You're HUGE!" "I know!" Elio boomed back. "I drank Mom's grow potion by mistake!" The friends had to cover their ears because his voice was so loud. "We need to fix this!" said Jamal. "Before you grow even bigger!" added Zara.

illustration.description: Four diverse children looking up at giant Elio with amazement. Maya has red curly hair and freckles, Jamal is a Black boy with a bicycle helmet, Zara has dark braided hair, and little Amara is hiding behind her sister. They're all pointing up with excited expressions while covering their ears from Elio's loud voice.
illustration.alt: Elio's friends looking up at him in amazement

pages.text: "My mom will know what to do!" Elio said. But when he tried to call down to the basement lab, his voice was too loud. BOOM! "MOM!" The whole neighborhood shook. Windows rattled. Dogs barked. "Too loud!" said Maya, covering her ears. "We need a quieter way!" said Jamal. Little Amara had an idea. She whispered to Zara. Zara smiled big. "Amara says we should use sign language!" Zara said. "Smart thinking!" said Maya.

illustration.description: The friends gathered in a circle, with little Amara whispering into Zara's ear while Maya and Jamal listen intently. Giant Elio is kneeling down trying to hear them, his huge ear tilted toward the group. The background shows a suburban street with rattling windows and confused neighbors peeking out.
illustration.alt: Amara whispering her idea to the group

pages.text: The friends made big gestures with their arms so Elio could see them. They pointed to the basement. They made shrinking motions with their hands. "Oh!" Elio whispered as quietly as he could. His whisper was still pretty loud. "You want me to get Mom from the lab!" He carefully reached through the basement window with one giant finger. He gently tapped on Mom's shoulder. Mom looked up from her test tubes and saw a huge finger. "Elio Roberto Martinez!" she said. "What did you do?"

illustration.description: Elio's giant finger poking through a basement window where his mom, a Latina scientist with glasses and a lab coat, looks shocked. She's surrounded by colorful bubbling potions and scientific equipment. Test tubes with rainbow liquids are scattered on the tables, and there's a surprised expression on her face.
illustration.alt: Elio's finger reaching into mom's lab

pages.text: Mom came outside with a tiny purple bottle. "This is Shrink-Quick potion," she said, holding it up. "But Elio is too big to hear me properly." Maya had an idea. "We can make a chain!" she said. "Like telephone!" Jamal stood close to Mom. Maya stood close to Jamal. Zara stood close to Maya. Little Amara climbed on Zara's shoulders. "Drink the purple potion!" Mom told Jamal. "DRINK THE PURPLE POTION!" Jamal told Maya. "DRINK THE PURPLE POTION!" Maya shouted to Zara.

illustration.description: The children forming a human chain to relay the message to giant Elio. Mom holds a tiny purple bottle, Jamal is shouting to Maya, Maya to Zara, and little Amara is on Zara's shoulders with her hands cupped around her mouth. Everyone has determined, helpful expressions in bright daylight.
illustration.alt: Friends making a telephone chain to communicate

pages.text: "DRINK THE PURPLE POTION!" Zara yelled to Amara. "DRINK THE PURPLE POTION!" little Amara shouted up to Elio. Even though she was the smallest, her voice was the loudest! Elio heard her perfectly. Mom threw the purple bottle up to Elio. He caught it carefully with two giant fingers. "Here goes nothing!" Elio said. He drank the purple potion. POOF! Purple sparkles surrounded him. He started shrinking. Smaller and smaller and smaller. Soon he was regular Elio-size again!

illustration.description: Elio shrinking in a cloud of purple sparkles and magical swirls. His friends are cheering below with their arms raised in celebration. His mom is clapping with relief. The purple magic creates beautiful spirals and stars around Elio as he returns to normal size, with a big happy smile on his face.
illustration.alt: Elio shrinking with purple magic sparkles

pages.text: "I'm back!" Elio said in his normal voice. All his friends cheered and hugged him. "That was the biggest adventure ever!" said Maya. "Literally!" laughed Jamal. Mom hugged Elio tight. "Next time, check the label before you drink anything from my lab," she said. "I will, Mom. I promise," said Elio. "Now, who wants pancakes?" asked Mom. "ME!" everyone shouted. As they walked to the house, Mrs. Chen called over the fence. "Much better size, Elio!" Everyone laughed. It was going to be a great day after all.

illustration.description: All the friends and Elio's mom walking toward the house together, arm in arm, laughing and smiling. Mrs. Chen waves from her garden in the background. The scene is warm and golden with the morning sun, showing the happy group heading inside for breakfast. Everyone looks joyful and relieved.
illustration.alt: Happy friends walking together toward the house

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: What did Elio accidentally drink?
questions.explanation: Elio thought he was drinking orange juice, but he actually grabbed Mom's Super-Size Growing Potion from the fridge!

questions.question: Who had the idea to use sign language to communicate?
questions.explanation: Little Amara whispered the idea to her sister Zara, who then shared it with everyone else.

questions.question: What color was the shrinking potion?
questions.explanation: Mom brought out a tiny purple bottle containing Shrink-Quick potion to help Elio return to normal size.

questions.question: How did the friends help Elio hear Mom's instructions?
questions.explanation: Maya suggested they make a chain like telephone, with each person passing the message from Mom up to giant Elio.

questions.question: What did Mom offer everyone at the end?
questions.explanation: After Elio returned to normal size, Mom invited everyone inside for pancakes, which is what Elio wanted for breakfast in the first place!

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words
pages.instructions: Help complete the story by choosing the right words!
pages.text: Elio woke up feeling very ___1___. He went to the kitchen and drank what he thought was ___2___ juice. But it was actually Mom's growing ___3___! Soon Elio became a ___4___ boy. His friends had to make a ___5___ to help him hear Mom's instructions.

pages.title: Character Connection
pages.instructions: Match each character with what they did to help Elio!
pages.text: ___1___ suggested making a telephone chain. ___2___ had the idea to use sign language. ___3___ brought the shrinking potion. ___4___ shouted the loudest to Elio.
